pages.text: Zhuji Cultivator is a neutral Foundation Establishment Middle cultivator. It can use Qi Gathering, Regeneration at low health, Fireball, Wind Step, Lingbeng, and Clear Heart Method behavior.

$(br)Jindan Cultivator is a neutral Golden Core Early cultivator. It uses Qi Gathering, stronger Regeneration at 25% health, Zhenshan Palm at range, Lightning Invocation nearby, and Wind Riding to chase or flee.
$(br)Gudiao is a hostile Foundation Establishment Late beast. Its attack creates a large scratch-shaped strike similar to Zhenshan Palm logic.

$(br)If a player dies after age is exhausted, a cultivator corpse remains. It keeps player-like attribute data, has half the player's health, falls with gravity, and can later be used by corpse-control systems.

$(br)Tomb and Ruined Ritual structures can appear in the world. Tomb chests use Zhuji-level spell and material loot. Ruined Ritual chests can contain many spirit stones, a Magic Ritual dagger, and a Magic Ritual guide book.
